steps: Resuspend cells staining buffer ( 300 µL of HBSS+EDTA+BSA). Resuspend in a 15-ml falcon tube.
Add Fc Block (~1:100 dilution) and incubate for 00:15:00 at 4 °C or in the fridge. Add this to cells resuspended in the HBSS.
Take ~5% of cells for unstained control, put On ice . Already did this during the isolation during the percoll separation step.
Add antibodies (CD11b, CD45, 1:100 dilution) for 20-30 min at 4 °C .
Add DAPI, 00:00:45 , then dilute with HBSS+BSA+EDTA.
Put 70-μm filter on top of a FACS test tube and filter resuspended pellet into the tube. Do this for unstained samples as well.
Vacuum out supernatant. Remove most of supernatant; not all.
Resuspend pellet in 500 µL to 1000 µL staining buffer. Depending on machine. Keep cells on ice the whole time.
Add directly to cells in the FC block.
Mix by tapping tube; do not vortex. Don’t add to unstained cells!!
Prepare collection tubes during spin time. Coat FACS tubes with 1 mL of staining buffer to prevent cells from sticking to walls of tubes. Invert tube several times.
